sentences.arabic: أَعْتَقِدُ أَنَّ الصِّدْقَ أَهَمُّ صِفَةٍ فِي الْإِنْسَانِ.
sentences.translation: Smatram da je iskrenost najvažnija osobina čovjeka.
sentences.translationEn: I believe that honesty is the most important quality in a person.

sentences.arabic: الشَّخْصُ الصَّادِقُ يَثِقُ النَّاسُ بِهِ دَائِمًا.
sentences.translationEn: An honest person is always trusted by people.

sentences.arabic: حِينَ تَكُونُ صَادِقًا لَا تَحْتَاجُ إِلَى تَذَكُّرِ مَا قُلْتَ.
sentences.translation: Kada si iskren, ne trebaš pamtiti šta si rekao.
sentences.translationEn: When you are honest you do not need to remember what you said.
I always try to tell the truth.
